steps.title: Pinpoint the evidence needed
steps.content: The underlined claim states that Esperanza's depiction inspired Latina authors to write about their own youth. Supporting evidence must show that Latina authors were actually inspired by the book to examine their own adolescence in fiction.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the claim
steps.content:
A provides exactly this: Latina authors testify in interviews that the book inspired them to write about their own adolescence.

  • B involves non-Latina authors
  • C only shows popularity metrics
  • D indicates comparison without confirming inspiration
.

This matches choice A — A is correct.
